members.name: ClearSettings
members.summary: Clears all settings.

members.name: GetDampingCurve
members.summary: Returns the damping curve when [method get_disperse_mode] is [constant DISPERSE_MODE_CUSTOM].

members.name: GetDisperseMode
members.summary: Returns whether to use automatic amount assignment or to allow manual assignment.

members.name: GetEndBone
members.summary: Returns the end bone index of the bone chain.

members.name: GetEndBoneDirection
members.summary: Returns the tail direction of the end bone of the bone chain when [method is_end_bone_extended] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: GetEndBoneName
members.summary: Returns the end bone name of the bone chain.

members.name: GetJointBone
members.signature: public int GetJointBone(int index, int joint)
members.summary: Returns the bone index at [param joint] in the bone chain's joint list.

members.name: GetJointBoneName
members.signature: public String GetJointBoneName(int index, int joint)
members.summary: Returns the bone name at [param joint] in the bone chain's joint list.

members.name: GetJointCount
members.summary: Returns the joint count of the bone chain's joint list.

members.name: GetJointTwistAmount
members.signature: public float GetJointTwistAmount(int index, int joint)
members.summary: Returns the twist amount at [param joint] in the bone chain's joint list when [method get_disperse_mode] is [constant DISPERSE_MODE_CUSTOM].

members.name: GetReferenceBone
members.summary: Returns the reference bone to extract twist of the setting at [param index]. This bone is either the end of the chain or its parent, depending on [method is_end_bone_extended].

members.name: GetReferenceBoneName
members.summary: Returns the reference bone name to extract twist of the setting at [param index]. This bone is either the end of the chain or its parent, depending on [method is_end_bone_extended].

members.name: GetRootBone
members.summary: Returns the root bone index of the bone chain.

members.name: GetRootBoneName
members.summary: Returns the root bone name of the bone chain.

members.name: GetTwistFrom
members.summary: Returns the rotation to an arbitrary state before twisting for the current bone pose to extract the twist when [method is_twist_from_rest] is [code]false[/code].

members.name: GetWeightPosition
members.summary: Returns the position at which to divide the segment between joints for weight assignment when [method get_disperse_mode] is [constant DISPERSE_MODE_WEIGHTED].

members.name: IsEndBoneExtended
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the end bone is extended to have a tail.

members.name: IsTwistFromRest
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if extracting the twist amount from the difference between the bone rest and the current bone pose.

members.name: SetDampingCurve
members.signature: public void SetDampingCurve(int index, Curve curve)
members.summary: Sets the damping curve when [method get_disperse_mode] is [constant DISPERSE_MODE_CUSTOM].

members.name: SetDisperseMode
members.signature: public void SetDisperseMode(int index, int disperseMode)
members.summary: Sets whether to use automatic amount assignment or to allow manual assignment.

members.name: SetEndBone
members.signature: public void SetEndBone(int index, int bone)
members.summary: Sets the end bone index of the bone chain.

members.name: SetEndBoneDirection
members.signature: public void SetEndBoneDirection(int index, int boneDirection)
members.summary: Sets the end bone tail direction of the bone chain when [method is_end_bone_extended] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: SetEndBoneName
members.signature: public void SetEndBoneName(int index, String boneName)
members.summary: Sets the end bone name of the bone chain. [b]Note:[/b] The end bone must be a child of the root bone.

members.name: SetExtendEndBone
members.signature: public void SetExtendEndBone(int index, bool enabled)
members.summary: If [param enabled] is [code]true[/code], the end bone is extended to have a tail. If [param enabled] is [code]false[/code], [method get_reference_bone] becomes a parent of the end bone and it uses the vector to the end bone as a twist axis.

members.name: SetJointTwistAmount
members.signature: public void SetJointTwistAmount(int index, int joint, float twistAmount)
members.summary: Sets the twist amount at [param joint] in the bone chain's joint list when [method get_disperse_mode] is [constant DISPERSE_MODE_CUSTOM].

members.name: SetRootBone
members.signature: public void SetRootBone(int index, int bone)
members.summary: Sets the root bone index of the bone chain.

members.name: SetRootBoneName
members.signature: public void SetRootBoneName(int index, String boneName)
members.summary: Sets the root bone name of the bone chain.

members.name: SetTwistFrom
members.signature: public void SetTwistFrom(int index, Quaternion from)
members.summary: Sets the rotation to an arbitrary state before twisting for the current bone pose to extract the twist when [method is_twist_from_rest] is [code]false[/code]. In other words, by calling [method set_twist_from] by [signal SkeletonModifier3D.modification_processed] of a specific [SkeletonModifier3D], you can extract only the twists generated by modifiers processed after that but before this [BoneTwistDisperser3D].

members.name: SetTwistFromRest
members.signature: public void SetTwistFromRest(int index, bool enabled)
members.summary: If [param enabled] is [code]true[/code], it extracts the twist amount from the difference between the bone rest and the current bone pose. If [param enabled] is [code]false[/code], it extracts the twist amount from the difference between [method get_twist_from] and the current bone pose. See also [method set_twist_from].

members.name: SetWeightPosition
members.signature: public void SetWeightPosition(int index, float weightPosition)
members.summary: Sets the position at which to divide the segment between joints for weight assignment when [method get_disperse_mode] is [constant DISPERSE_MODE_WEIGHTED]. For example, when [param weight_position] is [code]0.5[/code], if two bone segments with a length of [code]1.0[/code] exist between three joints, weights are assigned to each joint from root to end at ratios of [code]0.5[/code], [code]1.0[/code], and [code]0.5[/code]. Then amounts become [code]0.25[/code], [code]0.75[/code], and [code]1.0[/code] respectively.

members.name: MutableBoneAxes
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the solver retrieves the bone axis from the bone pose every frame. If [code]false[/code], the solver retrieves the bone axis from the bone rest and caches it.

members.name: SettingCount
members.summary: The number of settings.

values.name: DISPERSE_MODE_CUSTOM
values.summary: You can assign arbitrary amounts to the joint list. See also [method set_joint_twist_amount]. When [method is_end_bone_extended] is [code]false[/code], a child of the reference bone exists solely to determine the twist axis, so its custom amount has absolutely no effect at all.

values.name: DISPERSE_MODE_EVEN
values.summary: Assign amounts so that they monotonically increase from [code]0.0[/code] to [code]1.0[/code], ensuring all weights are equal. For example, with five joints, the amounts would be [code]0.2[/code], [code]0.4[/code], [code]0.6[/code], [code]0.8[/code], and [code]1.0[/code] starting from the root bone.

values.name: DISPERSE_MODE_WEIGHTED
values.summary: Assign amounts so that they monotonically increase from [code]0.0[/code] to [code]1.0[/code], based on the length of the bones between joint segments. See also [method set_weight_position].

constants.name: DISPERSE_MODE_EVEN
constants.summary: Assign amounts so that they monotonically increase from [code]0.0[/code] to [code]1.0[/code], ensuring all weights are equal. For example, with five joints, the amounts would be [code]0.2[/code], [code]0.4[/code], [code]0.6[/code], [code]0.8[/code], and [code]1.0[/code] starting from the root bone.

constants.name: DISPERSE_MODE_WEIGHTED
constants.summary: Assign amounts so that they monotonically increase from [code]0.0[/code] to [code]1.0[/code], based on the length of the bones between joint segments. See also [method set_weight_position].

constants.name: DISPERSE_MODE_CUSTOM
constants.summary: You can assign arbitrary amounts to the joint list. See also [method set_joint_twist_amount]. When [method is_end_bone_extended] is [code]false[/code], a child of the reference bone exists solely to determine the twist axis, so its custom amount has absolutely no effect at all.
